hero.title: Engineering-ready medical solutions for modern healthcare brands.
hero.description: Fujian Medical Engineering is presented here as a clean landing page starter for medical device engineering, product integration, manufacturing support, and lifecycle service operations.

engineering.title: Engineering
engineering.description: Prototype development, product customization, and system integration for healthcare equipment programs.

production.title: Production
production.description: Scalable support for sourcing, assembly coordination, and launch preparation across device lines.

support.title: Support
support.description: Documentation, training, and service planning designed for distributor and hospital teams.

panel.label: Why this starter works
panel.title: A reusable structure for a medical engineering brand
panel.description: The layout is built to be easy to expand with real products, certifications, brochures, case studies, and inquiry workflows.

fast.title: Fast to customize
fast.description: Swap copy, colors, sections, and links without changing the core project structure.

compliance.title: Healthcare-friendly tone
compliance.description: Designed to communicate reliability, clarity, and technical confidence for B2B buyers.

panel.noteDescription: Responsive layout, sticky header, multi-language support, and placeholder contact area ready for your real company details.

about.title: Built as a strong starting point for a medical engineering company website.
about.description: This base project positions Fujian Medical Engineering as a technical and dependable partner serving healthcare manufacturers, distributors, and institutional buyers.

mission.title: Practical solutions for healthcare equipment delivery
mission.description: Use this space to describe your company mission, core competencies, and the value you bring to product development or market expansion.

quality.title: Structured processes with quality-focused execution
quality.description: This section can be expanded with your internal QA approach, manufacturing controls, testing workflow, and documentation readiness.

partnership.title: Flexible collaboration for OEM, ODM, and distribution
partnership.description: Position the brand for long-term partnerships with hospitals, procurement teams, distributors, and private-label device programs.

services.title: A service lineup tailored for device development and commercial delivery.
services.description: These cards are intentionally generic so you can adapt them to your exact product and engineering scope.

engineering.title: Device Engineering
engineering.description: Translate ideas into commercially viable equipment concepts with a structured technical process.
points: Integration planning for subsystems and components

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing Support
manufacturing.description: Coordinate production-readiness activities for better rollout control and clearer supplier alignment.

compliance.title: Documentation & Compliance
compliance.description: Organize product-facing materials that help buyers, partners, and internal teams move faster.

lifecycle.title: Lifecycle Service
lifecycle.description: Support long-term customer relationships with maintenance planning and after-sales coordination.

industries.title: Designed for multiple healthcare and device commercialization scenarios.
industries.description: Use these blocks to show the business segments you support or to introduce your product families.

hospital.title: Clinical and hospital equipment programs
hospital.description: Present your solutions for frontline healthcare environments where stability, usability, and uptime matter most.

diagnostics.title: Testing and diagnostic product support
diagnostics.description: Show how your engineering or supply capabilities help diagnostic brands improve deployment and field performance.

rehab.title: Rehab and therapeutic device categories
rehab.description: Adapt this card for physiotherapy, mobility support, patient monitoring, or home-care product lines.

oem.title: Private-label and custom manufacturing partnerships
oem.description: Highlight your ability to collaborate with overseas brands, channel partners, and procurement-driven product programs.

stats.title: Clear metrics and proof points help the site feel more credible.
stats.description: The numbers below are placeholders. Replace them with real company milestones, certifications, factory figures, or export coverage.

items.label: Years Experience
items.description: Use a strong headline number for corporate history, engineering tenure, or manufacturing track record.

items.label: Service Ready
items.description: Showcase support responsiveness or regional distributor coverage if that is central to your positioning.

items.label: Flexible Models
items.description: Communicate the commercial formats you support for medical equipment buyers and channel partners.

items.label: Documentation Friendly
items.description: Emphasize export orientation, multilingual support, or multi-market documentation readiness.

contact.title: Ready to turn this starter into your live company site?
contact.description: Replace the placeholders below with your actual contact details, CRM flow, embedded form, or WhatsApp / email links.

address.label: Address
address.value: Add your office or factory address here

form.title: Use this section for your real lead form
form.description: Right now it is a styled placeholder so you can quickly replace it with a working form library, backend endpoint, or external contact widget.

placeholders.name: Your contact name
placeholders.message: Tell us about your project, target market, product category, or partnership request

footer.copy: Base Vue landing page for Fujian Medical Engineering.
